articles.description:
The Big Deal Box arrives at Church's Texas Chicken as the fast-food fried chicken chain's latest meal deal.

Starting at $5, the Big Deal Box includes a choice of a leg and thigh or three tenders served with two regular classic sides, a Honey-Butter Biscuit, and a jalapeno pepper.
A seafood version that swaps in eight Classic Shrimp and cocktail sauce in lieu of chicken is also available and starts at $6.49. If you can't decide between the two, there's also the Surf & Turf Big Deal Box, which includes a leg and thigh or two tenders, four Classic Shrimp, two regular classic sides, a Honey-Butter Biscuit, and a jalapeno pepper.
Additionally, Church's continues to offer the Texas 2PC Feast and has brought back its Blueberry Cheesecake Fried Pie for a limited time.
The Texas 2PC Feast starts at $3.49 and includes a leg and thigh or two tenders with dipping sauce, accompanied by a Honey-Butter Biscuit and a jalapeno pepper.
Church's Blueberry Cheesecake Fried Pie is a turnover-style pie featuring a crispy, flaky crust and a combination of cheesecake filling and blueberry filling side by side. Prices may vary, but the pie costs $1.99 here in Los Angeles.
Photo via Church's Texas Chicken.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Church's Offers $5 Big Deal Box

articles.description:
Crumbl welcomes the new Biscoff Skillet Cookie to headline this week's limited-time selection of baked desserts. The full rotation available from February 16 through February 21, 2026, is as follows:

- Biscoff Skillet Cookie - A warm,  lightly-spiced Biscoff cookie topped with a scoop of mousse, crumbled Biscoff pieces, and a drizzle of melty Biscoff cookie butter.
- Raspberry Cheesecake - Vanilla cheesecake on a buttery graham cracker crust, topped with a tangy raspberry spread and a whipped cream rosette.
- S'mores Cookie - A graham cracker cookie packed with milk chocolate chips, topped with a melty marshmallow, chocolate drizzle, and buttery graham cracker crumbs.
- Buckeye Brownie Cookie - A warm chocolate brownie cookie topped with peanut butter and melted semi-sweet chocolate.
Crumbl also offers a permanent Classic menu that includes:
- Semi-sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie filled with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt.
- Pink Sugar Cookie - An almond sugar cookie topped with a pink almond frosting.
- Chocolate Crumb Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm chocolate cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and more Oreo cookie pieces. 
- Brownie Batter Cookie - A warm chocolate cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chips and topped with brownie batter.
- Snickerdoodle Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie rolled in a cinnamon-sugar coating.
- Celebration Cake Cookie - A warm cake batter cookie topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting and rainbow sprinkles.
Photo via Crumbl.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Crumbl Bakes New Biscoff Skillet Cookie

articles.description:
Ben & Jerry's launches three new flavors of its grocery store line of Sundaes, which feature pints of ice cream topped with whipped topping and more.

The new Sundae flavors are rolling out to retailers now and include:
- Straw-Bae Shortcake (pictured) - Sweet cream ice cream with shortcake cookies and strawberry swirls, topped with strawberry-swirled whipped topping and shortcake crumble.
- PB Blondie Bestie - Peanut butter ice cream with blonde brownies and graham cracker swirls, topped with caramel-swirled whipped topping & mini peanut butter cups.
- Mocha Mood Pie - Chocolate cold brew ice cream with chocolate cookies and chocolate cookie swirls, topped with fudge-swirled whipped topping and fudge chips.
Ben & Jerry's Sundaes launched in 2025 with a lineup that includes Dulce De-lish!, Choco-lotta Cheesecake, Turtle, and the Cookie Vermont-ster flavors. Sundae pints can be found at grocery retailers for a suggested price of $4.99 to $6.49.
Photo via Ben & Jerry's.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Ben & Jerry's Launches Three New Sundae Flavors

articles.description:
Jumbo Shrimp has made its way back onto the Del Taco menu for the 2026 Lenten/seafood season.

Available now for a limited time through April 14, 2026, the fast-food chain is serving up Jumbo Shrimp Tacos and Jumbo Shrimp Burritos.
Jumbo Shrimp Tacos are being offered at 2 for $6. Each one features crispy-fried Jumbo Shrimp, house-made pico de gallo, cabbage, and secret sauce, folded in a warm flour tortilla and served with a lime wedge.
The Jumbo Shrimp Burrito features Jumbo Shrimp, cilantro-lime rice, pico de gallo, cabbage, and secret sauce, wrapped up in a flour tortilla.
Del Taco is also offering a limited-time deal on its Beer Battered Fish Tacos, where you can get 3 for $7. The fish taco features a beer-battered and fried wild-caught Alaska Pollock filet, shredded cabbage, secret sauce, and pico de gallo, folded in a warm corn tortilla, and served with a lime wedge.
Photo via Del Taco.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Jumbo Shrimp Returns to Del Taco

articles.description:
Carl's Jr. is offering a limited-time deal where you can get a Famous Star burger for $1 when you buy one at regular price at participating locations chain-wide.

The Famous Star is one of Carl's Jr.'s signature burgers (along with the Western Bacon Cheeseburger). It features a charbroiled beef patty, melted American cheese, lettuce, tomato, onions, dill pickles, Special Sauce, and mayo, on a toasted sesame seed bun.
Prices vary, but a single-patty Famous Star (the promotion is only good on the single-patty version) costs $7.49 at my local Carl's Jr. in Los Angeles.
Photo via Carl's Jr.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Carl's Jr. Offers Buy-One-Get-One-for-$1 Deal on Famous Star Burger

articles.description:
Little Caesars' new Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix features two slices of Detroit-Style Deep Dish Pepperoni pizza, four pieces of Italian Cheese Bread, and Crazy Sauce for dipping.

It's $4.99 in most areas, but it cost me $5.99 here in Los Angeles.



This is basically the Detroit-Style version of Little Caesars' regular Slices-N-Stix. It's the same size as half of the chain's Detroit-Style Pizza.
I prefer this over the regular Slices-N-Stix, as, even though the crust is thicker, there's more cheese and texture to it. There's a nice contrast between the crispy edges and soft crumb. Mine was underbaked, though; it was soft and pale along the bottom rather than crisp.



The size makes for a hearty meal (or two light meals) with a nice variety between the cheese sticks and pizza. There's not a lot of pepperoni, but the flavor was there. I prefer ranch for dipping the cheese sticks, as the Crazy Sauce makes them taste more like pizza. They give a generous amount of Crazy Sauce, though. There's a fresh tang and light seasoned flavor to it.



Overall, Little Caesars' Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix hit the spot for a nice lunch. I'm a fan of Little Caesars' Detroit-Style Pizza and its Italian Cheese Bread, so getting the two in one affordable meal with little in the way of leftovers is a no-brainer for me.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Review: Little Caesars - Detroit-Style Slices-N-Stix

articles.description:
Wingstop introduces new $9 Loaded Flavor Boxes as a limited-time meal deal.

Each Loaded Flavor Box features six wings (your choice of boneless or classic) or three tenders and fries, tossed in one of four flavors and topped with a drizzle of Housemade Ranch.
Flavor options include Lemon Pepper, OG Hot, Garlic Parm, and Hot Honey Rub.
If you're comparing prices, a 3-piece Crispy Tender Combo (three tenders, regular fries or veggies sticks, one dip, and a 20-oz drink) costs $9.99 in Los Angeles, while a 6-piece Wing Combo (six boneless or classic wings, regular fries or veggies sticks, one dip, and a 20-oz drink) costs $13.59 (with boneless wings) to $14.59 (with classic wings).
Photo via Wingstop.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Wingstop Offers New $9 Loaded Flavor Boxes

articles.description:
Dutch Bros serves up two new flavors, the Pink Velvet Mocha and Luvstruck Rebel, for its 2026 Valentine's Day menu.

The Pink Velvet Mocha features a pink velvet-inspired flavor topped with a pink velvet frosting Soft Top. You can get it as an iced mocha, shake, freeze, or cold brew.
The Luvstruck Rebel features blackberry and vanilla flavors mixed with the chain's Rebel energy drink, topped with pink velvet frosting Soft Top. You can also get it as a shake or lemonade.
Both Valentine's Day drinks are now available at all Dutch Bros locations, while supplies last.
Photo via Dutch Bros Coffee.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Dutch Bros' Serves Up 2026 Valentine's Day Menu

articles.description:
Fatburger introduces a new smashburger, the Flatburger, for a limited time now through June 30, 2026, at participating locations.

The Flatburger features two lean beef patties smashed on the grill, served with American cheese, grilled onions, pickles, and Fatburger sauce (a tangy, creamy sauce) on a toasted bun
You may wonder why the chain is not calling the new burger the Skinnyburger; that's because the chain already has a Skinnyburger, which is a burger with beef patties as the bun.
Prices vary, but the Flatburger goes for $8.99 (versus $8.75 for an Original Fatburger) at a location near me in Los Angeles.
Photo via Fatburger.
Read more at Brand Eating!
articles.title: Fatburger Introduces New Flatburger

articles.description:
Frozen pizza brand Red Baron partners with Korean food brand Bibigo to launch new Red Baron x Bibigo Korean BBQ-Style Classic Crust Pizza this month as a limited-edition variety exclusive to Kroger stores.

The new pizza features a Korean BBQ‑style sauce, mozzarella, cheddar, marinated beef, carrots, caramelized onions, and green onions on Red Baron's Classic pizza crust. It weighs in at 21.95 ounces.
Both Red Baron and Bibigo are a part of CJ Schwan's, which also makes Freschetta Pizza, Tony's Frozen Pizza, Mrs. Smith's Pies, Edwards Frozen Pies, and Pagoda Egg Rolls.
Photo via CJ Schwan's.
Read more at Brand Eating!

Here's what this week's lineup from February 8 through February 14, 2026, looks like:


- New Strawberry Heart Cake (pictured)- A heart-shaped strawberry cake topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting.
- Dubai Chocolate Strawberry Brownie - Crumbl continues the Dubai chocolate trend with a fudge brownie layered with kataifi and pistachio filling, topped with milk chocolate, fresh strawberry slices, and a drizzle of pistachio cream.
